'''shadaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantiopode|enantiopode]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantiopode|enantiopode]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shadaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædæhæth|shædæhæth]] || [[word:shædæhæj|shædæhæj]] || [[word:shædæhæsh|shædæhæsh]] || [[word:shædæhæ|shædæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadadahath|shadadahath]] || [[word:shadadahaj|shadadahaj]] || [[word:shadadahash|shadadahash]] || [[word:shadadaha|shadadaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadahath|shadahath]] || [[word:shadahaj|shadahaj]] || [[word:shadahash|shadahash]] || [[word:shadaha|shadaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadafhath|shadafhath]] || [[word:shadafhaj|shadafhaj]] || [[word:shadafhash|shadafhash]] || [[word:shadafhaf|shadafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadahatha|shadahatha]] || [[word:shadahaja|shadahaja]] || [[word:shadahasha|shadahasha]] || [[word:shadahaka|shadahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadahath|shadahath]] || [[word:shadahaj|shadahaj]] || [[word:shadahash|shadahash]] || [[word:shadaha|shadaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadahathal|shadahathal]] || [[word:shadahajal|shadahajal]] || [[word:shadahashal|shadahashal]] || [[word:shadahakal|shadahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadahathatha|shadahathatha]] || [[word:shadahajaja|shadahajaja]] || [[word:shadahashasha|shadahashasha]] || [[word:shadahaka|shadahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadahathan|shadahathan]] || [[word:shadahajan|shadahajan]] || [[word:shadahashan|shadahashan]] || [[word:shadahakan|shadahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadahathaoro|shadahathaoro]] || [[word:shadahajaoro|shadahajaoro]] || [[word:shadahashaoro|shadahashaoro]] || [[word:shadahakaoro|shadahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
